full_text:
**4.10 Expansion --- Stitching Quality Control Notes**

Stitching and registration with Ashlar - Guidelines for reporting

Go through **each sample one by one** in Napari and visually check and
Report

1) Stitching verification: That all tiles are registered in all cycles

2\) Marker order verification: The cycles are registered in the right
order - correct looking marker expression in each cycle

3\) Registration verification: tiles are aligned correctly: check 1st
and last cycle

In practice - can be done in your laptop using Napari

1) open one sample, check the channels one by one and check that i)
 > signal matches the marker ii) no tiles are missing in any marker

2) Overlay DAPI signal from 1st to last cycle - 1st cycle in red, last
 > in green and confirm that you have only yellow nuclei -\> repeat
 > steps 1 and 2 for all sample one by one
